sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21253" key="burso/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βυρσ-όω</orth>, <sense id="n21253.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cover with skins</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leather</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:12:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.10</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
